rendered_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
notes: W1+W2 struct-collapse regression check. Opened chat.baidu.com, hard reload (ctrl+shift+r), typed PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) into the 文心助手 composer, submitted via Enter. Within ~5s the assistant bubble rendered the canonical PII block warning '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Expected_text '차단' present. Warning remained stable over a further ~16s observation — no LLM reply replaced it, confirming engine intercept fired and the W1+W2 dead-field removal + cached_*→extracted_kv migration did NOT regress baidu's warning rendering. Session was not logged in (登录 visible); engine-side intercept fires regardless. Baseline OK.
